name: Priya Sharma
text: Angel Decorators turned our wedding venue into a fairy tale! Every detail was perfect — from the mandap to the stage. Highly recommend their team!

name: Rahul Mehta
text: The birthday decoration for my daughter's 5th birthday was absolutely magical. The balloon arches and themed setup exceeded our expectations.

name: Ananya Reddy
text: Our engagement ceremony looked straight out of a dream. The floral canopy and fairy lights created the most romantic ambiance. Thank you, Angel Decorators!

name: Vikram Patel
text: The traditional housewarming decoration was beautifully done. Loved the marigold torans and rangoli designs. They truly understand our culture.
